scope: Deterministic functional gate for a knowledge + linter skill. NOT a paired with-skill/baseline LLM latency/cost benchmark.

skeleton_placeholder_lint.reason: raw template must not pass as a finished RFP

held_out_final_test.note: distinct from the 2 selftest regression guards; no new false positive/negative

notes: rfp-architect is knowledge + a deterministic Python linter; its release gate is the deterministic functional suite above. There is no LLM inference in the gated path, so latency/token deltas are not instrumented for this artifact type. See references/readiness_report.md.

2026.6.25 (rfp_lint-7) is a SkillOpt-style optimization pass on the scorer: row-aware eval-table parsing fixes a verbose-price-label false negative (price/simulation cap) and a threshold-row weight-sum false positive. SKILL.md / routing / references / task evals unchanged.
Legal sources were NOT re-verified live in this release; they are inherited from the 2026-06-16 live verification against 全國法規資料庫 and are unchanged. Re-verify by next_review_due 2026-09-23.
